case_title: TAD DELVIN VS. GORDON & REES, LLP.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED DEC-03-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON & REES, LLP.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,125.00 FILED BY DELVIN, TAD AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON & REES, LLP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GORDON & REES, LLP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELVIN, TAD AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON & REES, LLP.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELVIN, TAD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GORDON & REES, LLP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
